---
title: "We welcome 4 new individual members"
date: 2020-03-03
subtitle: "The Open Science Center counts 54 members! We want to introduce our latest members."
categories: ["New Members"]
---

The number of individual members of the OSC is continuously increasing since its foundation in November 2017 with 17 founding members. With our 4 new members, from 4 different disciplines, the OSC counts 54 members from 15 disciplines.

**_We are happy to introduce our new members, in alphabetical order:_**

---

**[Prof. Dr. Marco Düring](/people/people/marco-duering.qmd)**  

![](/people/people/images/duering_marco.jpg){width="30%"}

Institute for Stroke and Dementia Research

---

**[Dr. Julian Unkel](/people/people/julian-unkel.qmd)**  

![](/people/people/images/unkel_julian.png){width="30%"}

Department of Media and Communication

---

**[Prof. Dr. Helmut Küchenhoff](/people/people/helmut-kuechenhoff.qmd)**  

![](/people/people/images/kuechenhoff_helmut.jpg){width="30%"}

Statistical consulting laboratory

---

**[Dr. Julia Schulte-Cloos](/people/people/julia-schulte-cloos.qmd)**  

![](/people/people/images/schulte-cloos_julia.jpg){width="30%"}

Geschwister-Scholl-Institute for Political Science

---

Thank you for joining the initiative!
